zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Gorges於大約1304年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron22歲，母親Eleanor26歲。她於大約1320年與Sir Theobald Russell結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1376年在她的家鄉享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gorges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Erwin, Heinz, Otto, Wilhelm.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of various places in France named with Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (see Gorge 2).

variants.name: Gorge
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a deep valley, from Old French gorge ‘gorge, ravine’ (from Old French gorge ‘throat’), or a habitational name from any of various places in France named with this word.
English: variant of   Gorges   2 or   George  .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Gorges was born about 1304, in England, her father, Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron, was 22 and her mother, Eleanor, was 26. She married Sir Theobald Russell about 1320. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1376, in her hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Gorges est née environ 1304, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Eleanor, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Theobald Russell environ 1320. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1376, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Gorgesが約1304年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baronは22歳，母Eleanorは26歳であった。約1320年にSir Theobald Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1376年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Gorges(이)가 대략 1304년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 Sir Theobald Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1376년 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Gorges родилась около 1304 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Gorges 1st Baron было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Theobald Russell около 1320 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1376 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.
